cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out how long the experiment lasted. The question is asking about the duration of the experiment based on the text provided. The passage mentions a study conducted on 50 healthy adults. They were assigned to write for 20 minutes per day for three consecutive days. So the writing part lasted three days. Then, two weeks after the third day of writing, all participants received a skin biopsy. The wounds from the biopsy were photographed regularly over the following days to track healing. The results mention that on the 11th day after the biopsy, 76.2% of the expressive writing group had completely healed wounds compared to 42.1% in the other group.
